texto: People who are detained (held in prison) are locked up by their past, and because you are locked up by your past you are held hostage by your yesterdays. And if you are held hostage by your yesterdays, you cannot see your tomorrows. -- Rev. Earl Smith, author, Death Row Chaplain, creator of IMPACT (Incarcerated Men Putting Away Childish Things)
explicacao: Citação de Rev. Earl Smith sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “People who are detained (held in prison) are locked up by their past, and because you are locked …” articula motivacao, inspiracional, prison em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como luto e inspiracao.
